introSection: Wickiebaan, formerly Piratenbaan until 2013, is a steel enclosed sit down roller coaster located at Plopsa Indoor Coevorden in Drenthe, Netherlands. The ride has a pirates theme.
fullText: Wickiebaan, formerly Piratenbaan until 2013, is a steel enclosed sit down roller coaster located at Plopsa Indoor Coevorden in Drenthe, Netherlands. The ride has a pirates theme.
